title: Speed Builders
body:
This module added to the game similar to the small game plugin "**Speed Builders**" gameplay, players can create their own building to write down and quickly restore.

The module has added functions such as **multi-jump**, **switching old animations**, and **anti-damage areas** to increase the player experience.   Now, you only need to install this module, you can experience the same server gameplay!

In addition, this module has some adaptations for survival and adventure modes, and in general, you can use this module in both modes.

After testing, there is almost no difference between an in-game timer and a video timer, and seriously, I think this one can replace a video timer

**Enter /RBG-? Get all
